## Meeting Purpose

[In-depth discussion about Firework's video commerce platform and capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Firework provides an enterprise-grade video hosting and streaming platform to enable shoppable videos on websites, emails, and physical stores](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Their solutions cover short-form videos, long-form digital showrooms, live shopping, and 1-on-1 personalized video experiences](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Firework differentiates through its global infrastructure, data privacy/compliance, and services like content strategy and production](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Key customer profiles include direct-to-consumer brands, mid-market to enterprise companies with decent website traffic, industries like beauty, fashion, electronics, health/wellness](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)

## Topics

### Firework's Video Commerce Platform

  - [Enables minimum 30% increase in e-commerce conversions within 14 days without additional IT/content investment](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Three layers: interactive video player, video infrastructure, and video content management](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Provides shoppable videos, content import from social media, video streaming from Firework servers](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Allows video correlation to conversions and shopping integration](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Customer Examples and Use Cases

  - [Brands like Beyond Yoga, Higher Education use shoppable product videos on website](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Samsung used live video shopping for product launch events](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=2212.0)
  - [Brands leverage Firework for user reviews, influencer content (short-form) and brand storytelling (long-form)](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [CPG brands use videos to inspire purchases on e-commerce sites](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=3060.0)

### Handling Large Video/Product Catalogs

  - [Bulk video uploads and imports from social platforms](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Playlist creation to organize videos](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Embedding different video feeds on website pages](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [AI-assisted video tagging to product catalog](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Competitive Differentiation

  - [Enterprise-grade video infrastructure and global CDN for scalability and low latency](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Serves 70% of top global Fortune 500 retail/brands](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [Largest engineering team and funding for continuous innovation](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
  - [End-to-end solutions from short-form to live video, not just a video player](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [Video commerce strategy, content production services along with SaaS platform](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)

### Pricing and Customer Success

  - [Freemium model based on website traffic levels](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [$39/month for up to 10K monthly visits](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)
  - [$700/month for mid-market with customer support](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=2740.0)
  - [$3500+/month for enterprise with data privacy, compliance reviews](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Co-op services for content strategy, production at additional cost](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)

### Target Customers and Buying Centers

  - [CMOs, Heads of Marketing, E-commerce, Digital, Social Media](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=2562.0)
  - [Product Managers for the website/digital experience](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=3318.0)
  - [Brand Marketers and Content Heads (with some reservations on brand priorities)](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=3362.0)

## Next Steps

  - Explore creating content around Firework's solutions, capabilities, and customer use cases
  - Potentially leverage Firework's training materials, best practices as seeds for repackaged content
  - [Discuss featuring Firework's video email capabilities as an e-commerce upsell](https://fathom.video/share/xo-_jWN2z1CVJs3ByozNxi-W2t2Ku-Ub?tab=summary&timestamp=3544.0)
  - Follow up on Firework's new AI product 'Eva' in a future conversation
